_description: All React components in the Proximity app. Update COMPONENT_DESCRIPTIONS in generate-knowledge.mjs when adding new components.

components.name: AddressSearchInput
components.description: Mapbox address autocomplete input — used in add-listing and add-sub-lease forms

components.name: ButtonAuth
components.description: Sign in / sign out button using NextAuth

components.name: Footer
components.description: Site-wide footer

components.name: GlobalListingModal
components.description: Full-screen listing detail modal triggered from any listing card

components.name: Header
components.description: Top navigation bar with auth state, role-based links, and mobile menu

components.name: HeartIcon
components.description: Favorite/save toggle button for listings

components.name: HeroMapPreview
components.description: Landing page hero section with embedded map preview

components.name: HeroSection
components.description: Above-the-fold landing section with CTA

components.name: MapView
components.description: Main interactive Mapbox map — renders listing pins, popups, and clustering

components.name: Modal
components.description: Generic reusable modal wrapper

components.name: ModalDorms
components.description: Dorm detail modal with reviews

components.name: ProfileCompletionModal
components.description: Onboarding modal for new users to complete their profile

components.name: Providers
components.description: Root Next.js providers: SessionProvider, Toaster, etc.

components.name: ReviewsSection
components.description: Renders a list of reviews with ratings for a listing

components.name: UniversityLogosCarousel
components.description: Auto-scrolling carousel of university logos on the landing page

components.name: ChatContext
components.description: React context providing chat state and actions

components.name: ChatWidget
components.description: Floating chat widget UI using @chatscope/chat-ui-kit-react

components.name: leasing-funnel
components.description: Recharts funnel chart showing click → save → contact conversion

components.name: market-comparisons
components.description: Bar chart comparing landlord's listing metrics vs market average

components.name: trend-indicators
components.description: Sparkline trend indicators for views/saves over time

components.name: AvailableListings
components.description: Grid of listing cards for the browse page

components.name: BrowseContent
components.description: Top-level browse page layout — filters + listings + map split view

components.name: FilterComponents
components.description: Individual filter UI atoms (checkboxes, sliders, toggles)

components.name: ListingFilters
components.description: Filter panel aggregating all filter components

components.name: ListingMap
components.description: Map panel used inside the browse split view

components.name: ListingModalInfo
components.description: Detail pane for a listing shown inside the global modal

components.name: MapPopupCard
components.description: Small card shown in Mapbox popup when a pin is clicked

components.name: ModalListing
components.description: Wrapper that opens GlobalListingModal for a given listing

components.name: TopFilterBar
components.description: Sticky horizontal filter bar above the listings grid
